calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ken Mansfield for and with Tracy Kirkham.

Mr. Mansfield stated that both of the general partnerships were oral agreements, that he has K-1 documents for the general partnerships and for the limited partnership, that there are no additional documents to be produced and provided a declaration with the redacted k-1s attached. Ms. Kirkham stated that she is unable to find additional documents. The Court instructed Mr. Mansfield to file the declaration.The Petition for Spousal Property is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
